mapper.sql: select r.rectification_id, r.rectification_no, r.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, r.task_id, t.task_no, t.task_name, r.inventory_item_id, r.rectification_status, r.issue_type, r.issue_desc, r.responsible_dept_id, dept.dept_name as responsible_dept_name, r.responsible_user_id, ifnull(nullif(u.nick_name, ''), u.user_name) as responsible_user_name, r.deadline_date, r.completed_time, r.completion_desc, r.acceptance_remark, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark from ast_asset_rectification_order r left join ast_asset_ledger a on r.asset_id = a.asset_id left join ast_asset_inventory_task t on r.task_id = t.task_id left join sys_dept dept on r.responsible_dept_id = dept.dept_id left join sys_user u on r.responsible_user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select: where r.asset_id = #{assetId} order by r.create_time desc, r.rectification_id desc

select rectification_id, rectification_no, asset_id, task_id, inventory_item_id, rectification_status, issue_type, issue_desc, responsible_dept_id, responsible_user_id, deadline_date, completed_time, completion_desc, acceptance_remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from ast_asset_rectification_order where inventory_item_id = #{inventoryItemId} limit 1
select max(rectification_no) from ast_asset_rectification_order where rectification_no like concat(#{rectificationNoPrefix}, '%')
mapper.update: update ast_asset_rectification_order set rectification_status = #{rectificationStatus}, issue_type = #{issueType}, issue_desc = #{issueDesc}, responsible_dept_id = #{responsibleDeptId}, responsible_user_id = #{responsibleUserId}, deadline_date = #{deadlineDate}, completed_time = #{completedTime}, completion_desc = #{completionDesc}, acceptance_remark = #{acceptanceRemark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where rectification_id = #{rectificationId}
